reasoning: The crypto market is highly volatile, but a dip to $50,000 within the 2025 timeframe requires a substantial drop from its recent highs ($75k-$100k range coming into 2025). Historically, major bull markets (post-halving years like 2025) see 30-40% drawdowns, which from $100k would bring it to $60k-70k. While a 50% flash crash or deep correction is possible, it is less likely to happen within this specific year-long window before a larger macro top is fully established and breaks down significantly. Without real-time access to PM data to confirm market sentiment, I estimate a 20% historical base rate probability for a specific deep drawdown threshold like this during a typical post-halving year.
